brief_notes: Accurate reproduction of all key AUC values (0.66/0.76 EUP vs ANU, 0.708/0.826 EUP vs CxA), MAE (1.855 +/- 0.03 vs 1.877 +/- 0.027), training times, and inference times. Coverage of all four datasets, external validation on Spain and Florida, and STORK-V deployment. One minor hallucination: specific Pearson correlation >0.7 detail expanded beyond extraction context. Figures are referenced but appear to be placeholders. The intro_relwork.tex is an external input file which may or may not be complete.
